fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period shown in the line.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date for the evaluation of the machine centers, which according to the actual planning are overloaded.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of work that can be done in a specified time period at this machine center.

fields.name: Allocated Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of capacity that is needed to produce a desired output in a given time period.

fields.name: Availability After Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the available capacity of this work center group that is not used in the planning of a given time period.

fields.name: Load
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the required number of times that all the planned and actual orders are run on the machine center in a specified period.
